data.title: BENEV® Partners with LaserAway® to Launch XTherma®: The First High-Frequency RF and Cryogen Combination Therapy Device in the U.S.
data.description: In Mission Viejo, California, on March 26, 2026, BENEV® Company Inc. revealed a significant development. As an FDA-registered manufacturer and key player in the medical aesthetics distribution realm, BENEV® focuses on medical devices, cosmeceuticals, and pharmaceuticals. This announcement pertains to a strategic partnership recently formed by the company.

data.title: EY launches EY Blockchain Privacy Sandbox to enable experimentation with privacy-preserving smart contracts on public blockchains
data.description: A new sandbox has been launched to assist developers in creating, testing, and validating proof-of-concept use cases using the Starlight zero-knowledge proof compiler from the public domain. This tool eliminates the need for local setup and aims to simplify the process by reducing technical obstacles linked to zero-knowledge technology. The sandbox also facilitates API-based integration, making it easier for developers to utilize the compiler in their projects. This initiative is expected to improve accessibility and encourage wider adoption of zero-knowledge technology in the industry.

data.title: Typewise's 2026 Agentic AI Index Finds 81% of Customer Service Teams Still Operating AI as Disconnected Tools
data.description: A recent survey conducted on frontline customer service representatives has shown significant coordination gaps among AI agents, as well as undisclosed errors within the agency. The study highlights an increasing demand for better orchestration as customer experience (CX) teams are rapidly adopting AI technologies. The survey was conducted jointly in Zürich and San Francisco and was released on March 26, 2026. Companies like Typewise, specializing in AI customer service solutions for enterprises, are striving to address these challenges as they scale up AI adoption.

data.title: Real Results, Real Reviews: Customers Earn Square 9 Top G2 Honors
data.description: Recognition for Square 9 Softworks has surged, with customers leading the charge in praising the company for its efficiency, visibility, and workflow automation. The company recently earned multiple top awards through G2 reviews, a prominent software platform. The accolades highlight the tangible benefits experienced by customers, showcasing significant increases in efficiency, visibility, and workflow automation. The awards come as a testament to the positive impact Square 9 Softworks has had on its users, reflecting the company's commitment to delivering valuable solutions.

data.title: SUEWALLST, LLP: INSTITUTIONAL RGNX HOLDERS FACE PORTFOLIO LOSSES FROM GENE THERAPY FRAUD
data.description: Attention to Pension Funds, Asset Managers, and Fiduciaries:Individuals and entities possessing positions in REGENXBIO, Inc. (NASDAQ: RGNX) from February 9, 2022, to January 27, 2026, are advised to consider potential lead plaintiff roles. Please review this opportunity carefully.

data.title: PicnicHealth Launches ThumbPrint: A Patient-Anchored Alternative to Tokenization
data.description: A new patient-focused data model is providing sponsors with increased flexibility to access more comprehensive real-world evidence throughout the entire study process. PicnicHealth, a health tech company based in San Francisco, announced on March 26, 2026, that this innovative approach is enhancing non-interventional research capabilities. This development aims to unlock a wealth of valuable insights for sponsors, potentially transforming the study landscape.

data.title: Jeep® Brand Rolls Into the 60th Easter Jeep Safari, Celebrating Decades of Trail-built Toughness
data.description: AUBURN HILLS, Michigan, March 26, 2026 - The Jeep® brand, along with Jeep Performance Parts (JPP) by Mopar, will be participating in the 60th anniversary of the Easter Jeep Safari in Moab, Utah, from March 28 to April 5, 2026. This year, they are showcasing a greater number of vehicles and off-road experiences for Jeep customers and enthusiasts. The event promises a fresh lineup of...

data.title: Unanet Unveils Partners of the Year 2025-2026
data.description: The yearly partner summit gathered specialists committed to achieving enhanced outcomes for Government Contractors and Architecture, Engineering, and Construction firms in Dulles, Virginia. The event took place on March 26, 2026. Unanet, a prominent provider of AI-driven ERP systems and growth solutions tailored for project-centric enterprises, led the summit.

data.title: New Report: In 2024, Parkinson's Disease Cost the U.S. $82.2 Billion, Surpassing Previous Projections
data.description: Research results revealed that the yearly expenses have exceeded the estimated $79 billion for 2037, reaching this milestone more than ten years in advance. Care partners have faced a significant setback, encountering a total of $8.3 billion in decreased earnings and productivity. This reduction can be attributed to factors such as truncated work schedules, premature retirement, or departure from the workforce. When considering disability-related costs in conjunction with these figures, the economic impact is substantial.

data.title: GigaMedia Announces Fourth-Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 26, 2026, GigaMedia Limited (NASDAQ: GIGM) released its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and entirety of 2025. In 2025, GigaMedia registered revenues totaling $3.5 million, achieving a gross profit of $1.8 million, despite facing an operating loss.

data.title: Lunai Bioworks Executes $20M Strategic Transaction at Fixed $1.50 Conversion, Acquiring BBB Delivery Platform for CNS Alzheimer's Therapies with Broad CNS Delivery Applications
data.description: A strategic deal worth $20 million was revealed by Lunai Bioworks, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNAI) on March 26, 2026, in Sacramento, California. The agreement involves the acquisition of advanced blood-brain barrier (BBB) delivery technology along with central nervous system (CNS) Alzheimer's drug assets. This significant transaction marks a key development in the company's efforts to enhance its pharmaceutical portfolio and expand its capabilities in neurological treatments.

data.title: Omdia: YouTube Expected to Approach 3 Billion Global Users by 2027 as Netflix Surpasses 1 Billion
data.description: In London, a recent forecast by Omdia predicts that by 2027, Netflix will surpass 1 billion monthly active users worldwide, while YouTube is projected to near 3 billion users globally. Maria Rua Aguete, the Head of Media & Entertainment at Omdia, shared this data at Series Mania. This information underscores the significant impact global platforms are having on video consumption trends in Europe. Aguete, along with Justine Ryst, the Managing Director of YouTube France and Southern Europe, discussed these findings during a session at the event.

data.title: NYSE Lists Global X NYSE® 100 ETF, Expanding Access to Tech-Enabled Growth Companies
data.description: In New York, the Global X NYSE® 100 ETF (NYSX) has been listed on the NYSE, enabling investors to engage in the NYSE 100 Index's performance.

data.title: Prometheus Real Estate Group's Brickline Providing New High-End Experiences to Downtown San Mateo
data.description: Prometheus Real Estate Group has revealed the latest tenants set to open at Brickline, a fully-leased property in SAN MATEO, Calif. The grand openings feature upscale dining and wellness-focused offerings, marking an exciting development in the property's lineup. The announcement, made on March 26, 2026, highlights the diverse range of businesses now operating in the area. This next wave of tenants brings added vibrancy to the mixed-use property, enhancing the overall experience for visitors and residents alike.

data.title: Bybit Launches AED Fiat Referral Boost Campaign with 7,500 USDT Prize Pool
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on March 26, 2026 - Bybit, the cryptocurrency exchange with the second-highest trading volume globally, has introduced the AED Fiat Referral Boost program. This initiative offers special rewards solely for AED fiat deposits made on Bybit. This program is set to run from the launch date until April 26, 2026. Participants who engage in this initiative have the opportunity to receive additional benefits...

data.title: Owlet Joins Babylist to Donate Product to Children's Hospital Los Angeles in Support of Make March Matter Campaign
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT), a leading provider of smart infant monitoring solutions, has partnered with Babylist to support Children's Hospital Los Angeles in its 11th annual Make March Matter campaign. This campaign aims to raise funds for critical pediatric care at one of the nation's top children's hospitals. The event took place at the Babylist Showroom in Beverly Hills, where Owlet's mission of ensuring every baby receives the best start in life was highlighted. Owlet's contribution underscores its commitment to supporting families in need, aligning with the hospital's goal of providing essential healthcare services to children.
